name: Chinese Noodle Salad with Summer Squash and C
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cabbage or bok choy, shredded
1/2 cup Daikon or other radish, sliced
1/4 cup Scallions or chives, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the dressing, combine 2 tbsp toasted sesame oil, 2 tbsp light soy sauce, 2 tbsp tomato juice, 2 tbsp white wine vinegar, and 2 tbsp apple or orange juice in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Toss noodles, cabbage, squash, zucchini, daikon, scallions, carrots, garlic, sesame seeds, nutmeg, and reserved dressing together.
3. Garnish with cashews and blossoms if desired.
